prompt: Navigate to LinkedIn (https://www.linkedin.com), open the post composer, and write an engaging short-form post on: 'The most underrated skill in software engineering is clear written communication — here's why.' Format with hook, insight paragraphs, evidence, CTA, and 3-5 hashtags. Keep paragraphs 1-2 sentences. Post it or capture a screenshot if posting requires confirmation. If not logged in, stop and report.
